title: Emotion Recognition

imgs.name: Use your own photos or pick from Examples
Recognize Live from your Web Camera

description: Classify emotions from photos and videos or try live recognition!
points: Uses three trained neural network models for recognition, and a separate OpenCV model for detecting faces
Simple, intuitive UI allows the user to classify emotions from different sources.

title: Semantic Segmentation

imgs.name: Test out a drone image using 4 different models
Learn about different Neural Network architectures

description: Explore different Neural Networks in the task of classifying different objects from drone photographs.
points: Analyzes images using 4 different neural network architectures and a baseline model.
Provides visualizations and numeric values for comparison.

title: Pride Kitchen

imgs.name: Merge Pride Flags, generating unique combinations
A collection of 20+ flags of different identities

description: Mix & Match various pride flags and challenge your creativity.
points: Allows users to creatively combine over 20 different flags.
Built with Rust and Dioxus for fast, responsive and stable experience.
Multiple customization options and export functionality.

title: Events Khmelnytskyi

imgs.name: Fetches data from many different sources
Creates a global feed with caching functionality

description: This website scrapes events from various open sources, creating a global feed of cultural data. I use it to find and post news in a cultural telegram channel.
points: Fetches data from 15+ web sources, reducing manual work required to find the event information.
Uses database for caching and organizing data, making website reloads significantly faster.
